violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. Surfaces must be washed and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025

Marinara and French onion soup, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Person in charge voluntarily disposed of food at the time of inspection. Proper cooling methods and procedures reviewed with person in charge at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

Various food items in the walk-in cooler were observed held at 46-50 degrees Fahrenheit in the walk-in cooler. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC, all items were stored in the walk-in cooler overnight. Person in charge voluntarily disposed of food at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025
The walk-in cooler was observed in poor repair (ambient temperature at 47 degrees Fahrenheit). Unit to not be used until it can be repaired/replaced/serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025
Chili was observed with mold in the refrigeration unit. Person in charge voluntarily disposed of food at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment to use dishwasher for washing ONLY. All equipment and utensils to be sanitized in the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024

The following was observed in poor repair: 1) The freezer door in the kitchen was observed with duct tape 2) The flip top prep unit top door was observed to not be properly connected 3) The metal sheets in the walk-in cooler observed to be lifting New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chorline sanitizing solution for the dishwasher and the quaternary ammonium test strips for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024
The flip top prep unit next to the reach-in cooler was observed with water pooling at the bottom. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. At the time of inspection, a new bucket of Chlorine Sanitizing Solution was replaced and was observed testing properly at 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2023

REDUCED OXYGEN PACKAGED FISH that bears a label indicating that it is to be kept frozen until time of use shall be removed from the reduced oxygen environment immediately upon removal from the freezer. (Lobster was observed held above 37 degrees Fahrenheit. Product was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection.) Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2023
